Alumni Weekend
Save the Date
Alumni Weekend 2026
October 23-24, 2026
More information to follow! Stay tuned for updates.
We're excited to see you back on campus! Alumni Weekend is a two-day celebration of the wonderful Webb community and the friendships that we value. This year, we have an exciting weekend of activities planned for you to reconnect with your classmates.
Questions: Email
alumni@webb.org
or call (909) 482-5230
Become a Reunion Chair Volunteer!
We'd love your help in planning your milestone reunion! If you're interested, please email
alumni@webb.org
for more details!
Alumni Weekend 2026 Information
List of 2 items.
Travel and Accomodations
To help with your travel plans, here are some recommendations. Make your reservations early. Space fills up quickly.
AIRPORTS
Ontario International Airport (ONT) is the closest airport to Webb, located approximately 12 miles away. It is the most convenient airport to fly into and is served by most major airlines and car rental agencies.
Other airports in the Los Angeles area include :
Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) – 52.5 miles away
John Wayne Airport (SNA) – 41 miles away
Hollywood Burbank Airport (BUR) – 40 miles away
Long Beach Airport (LGB) – 49 miles away
Transportation options to Webb from these airports include renting a car, utilizing Uber or Lyft rideshare services, or taking an airport shuttle van to Claremont.
HOTEL BLOCKS
A limited number of rooms are reserved for the nights of October 22-25, 2026. Room rates are available until the date listed below or until the group block is sold out, whichever comes first. Make your reservations as soon as possible to ensure that you are able to book at our special rate!
The Doubletree Claremont
555 West Foothill Boulevard, Claremont, CA 91711
(909) 626-2411 or (800) 222-8733
Rate:
$174/night
Rate available until July 24 or until block is sold out.
Click here to reserve your room!
Sheraton Fairplex Suites
601 West McKinley Avenue, Pomona, CA 91768
(909) 622-2220
Rate:
$188/night
Rate available until September 24 or until block is sold out.
Click here to reserve your room!
More information coming soon!

Airbnb
Airbnb is a platform that allows people to rent out their homes, apartments, or unique spaces to travelers seeking short-term accommodations. It connects hosts with guests worldwide, offering a wide range of lodging options beyond traditional hotels. There are many accommodations available in Claremont and surrounding areas, many within walking distance.
Alumni Awards
Nominations for the 2026 Alumni Awards are now open!
Clicking here to submit your nomination
!
The Alumni Awards represent the highest distinction bestowed on alumni of The Webb Schools. The program aims to instill an appreciation of Webb’s past and how a Webb education can be utilized. Recipients exemplify one or more core principles of Webb’s mission:
Think boldly, mindfully, and creatively,
Act with honor and moral courage,
Lead with distinction,
Serve with a generous spirit.
There are three honors in which an alumni can be awarded:
The
Alumni Outstanding Achievement Award
pays tribute to alumni who best exemplify the core values of their school’s motto
.
The
Colborn Distinguished Service Award
,
named in honor of Ken Colborn ’47, pays tribute to an alumnus/a in recognition of selfless commitment and ongoing volunteer service to The Webb Schools and/or Raymond M. Alf Museum of Paleontology.
The
Young Alumni Rising Star Award
recognizes individuals up to their 15th reunion who have made notable achievements in their chosen field, doing good for their community.
Want to nominate someone for an Alumni Award?
Click here
to submit your nomination!

NOTICE OF NONDISCRIMINATORY POLICY AS TO STUDENTS.
The Webb School admits students of any race, color, national and ethnic origin to all the rights, privileges, programs, and activities generally accorded or made available to students at the school. It does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national and ethnic origin in administration of its educational policies, admissions policies, scholarship and loan programs, and athletic and other school-administered programs.
